BackstoryDef.title: Chempane salesman
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] worked at a Chempane and grill business, proudly wearing the name of 'Krickland Chempane' as a badge of honor. [PAWN_nameDef] was the top salesperson and carried the entire business on their shoulders with their quick wit and silver tongue. [PAWN_nameDef]'s famous catchphrase; "Don't get neck pain, use Chempane" won [PAWN_objective] the Chempane salesman of the year award for 3 years.
